name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSMC) is the world's largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry. Founded in 1987 and headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan, the company manufactures a wide range of integrated circuits for global customers across various industries, including mobile devices, high-performance computing, automotive electronics, and the Internet of Things. As a pioneer of the pure-play foundry business model, TSMC provides advanced process technologies and design ecosystem services, enabling the production of the world's most sophisticated microchips for leading technology companies.
